{{Quote|This wins you no sympathy. Mercy will.|Kaim to the hostage takers|<ref name="OST" />}}
'''Kaim''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], Kaim received [[Jedi training/Legends|education]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during its last decade. Master Kaim was stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] at this time, a skilled [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomat]] and an appointed [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the Temple's [[Jedi academy|academy]].<ref name="OST" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Kaim remained on Coruscant to continue teaching at the academy. However, when [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Meena Tills/Legends|Meena Tills]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] was [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege|taken hostage]] at the [[Galactic City Spaceport]], Master Kaim was dispatched to negotiate the release of Senator Tills and other passengers of the transport the terrorists had taken. Working with [[Senate Head of Public Affairs]] [[Mar Rugeyan]] and [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jaller Obrim]], Kaim prepared to enter the area of the spaceport the hostage takers had occupied. Prepped by members of [[Omega Squad]], Master Kaim agreed to plant a [[strip-cam]] somewhere in the room so the troopers could oversee the hostage crisis, leaving his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] with them.<ref name="OST" />

Inside the chamber, Master Kaim confronted the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] terrorists and attempted to persuade them into releasing [[Joz Larutur|Joz]] and [[Cira Larutur]], an elderly couple from [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. The terrorists, noticing the active strip-cam soon after Kaim planted it, became enraged and shot Master Kaim point-blank in the face. In an act of terrorism, the Korunnai men strapped explosives to Kaim's desecrated body and tossed it back to the Republic forces stationed outside the terminal chamber. Before the bomb exploded, [[Fi Skirata|RC-8015]] of Omega Squad threw himself over Kaim's body and the bomb, preventing any casualties. While Kaim's body was destroyed, the Commando was protected by his armor.<ref name="OST" />
